title: kylepquinn/3D-MPM-registration: v1.0 - Initial Release - code related to Jones et al., Communications Biology, 2018
author: Quantitative Optical Imaging Lab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains MATLAB code to register label-free multiphoton z-stacks in 3D across multiple excitation and emission channels.
steps_raw: This repository contains MATLAB code to register label-free multiphoton z-stacks in 3D across multiple excitation and emission channels.
